name: french yogurt cake
instructions: ratio 3:2:1:1 (flour:sugar:yogurt:oil) where 1 part = 1/2 cup. so 1.5 cup all-purpose flour (not wheat or cake), 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup yogurt, 1/2 cup oil. plus 3 eggs, 1.5 tsp baking powder, 1/2 tsp salt, 1 tsp vanilla.
notes: yogurt or greek yogurt both work. vegetable or olive oil both acceptable.
